info.name: ThreadHive - Thread Endpoints
info.description: Postman collection for all Thread API endpoints in the ThreadHive backend.

variable.description: Replace with a valid Thread _id from your database

request.description: Returns all threads sorted by creation date (newest first), with author and subreddit populated.
Returns a single thread by its MongoDB ObjectId, with author and subreddit populated. Returns 404 if not found.

Creates a new thread. Required fields: title, content, author (User ObjectId), subreddit (Subreddit ObjectId). Returns 201 with populated author (name) and subreddit (name, description). Returns 400 if any required field is missing.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated: Best resources for learning Express.js",
  "content": "Updated content with more details about Express.js learning paths.",
  "upvotes": 10,
  "downvotes": 1,
  "voteCount": 9
}

request.description: Updates an existing thread by its MongoDB ObjectId. Allowed fields: title, content, upvotes, downvotes, voteCount. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated. Returns 404 if the thread does not exist.
Deletes a thread by its MongoDB ObjectId. Returns 200 with the deleted document on success. Returns 404 if the thread does not exist.
